code:
import io
import string

fn abs_int(_ x: Int) -> Int
  if x < 0
    -x
  else
    x
  end
end

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut token = ""
mut have_best = false
mut best_val = 0
mut best_abs = 0

while i <= n
  mut is_sep = true
  if i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      is_sep = true
    else
      is_sep = false
    end
  end

  if is_sep
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        let a = abs_int(v)
        if not have_best
          best_val = v
          best_abs = a
          have_best = true
        else if a < best_abs
          best_val = v
          best_abs = a
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    let bb = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(bb)}"
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("min_abs=#{best_val}")
